steps.title: Identify the starting area and removal rate
steps.content: The large square has area 36 cm². Each small square removed takes away 4 cm². If we remove $x$ small squares, then the total area removed is $4x$ cm².

steps.title: Write the function for remaining area
steps.content:
The remaining area equals the starting area minus what was removed:
$$f(x) = 36 - 4x$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
